name: jarbou3i-model
description: Jarbou3i Model: a modular, client-side trilingual dual-lens workbench with release-candidate evidence artifact review, hosted-demo public UI lock checks, CI hygiene, lens import contracts, cross-locale export QA, lens-aware strategic and biopolitical scoring, schema-governed prompts, and HTML report export.

scripts.test: npm run test:qa && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:ci:no-browser: npm run test:qa && npm run test:static && npm run test:schema && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:a11y:static && npm run test:ci:contract && npm run test:hygiene
scripts.test:browser:core: playwright test tests/a11y.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/rtl-mobile.spec.js tests/export-contract.spec.js tests/lens-import-contract.spec.js tests/cross-locale-export-contract.spec.js
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:browser:core && npm run test:browser:hosted
scripts.test:ci:browser: npm run test:browser && npm run test:evidence:hosted
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:no-browser && npm run test:ci:browser
